steps.title: Write the weight formula
steps.content:
The total weight equals the weight per cubic foot times the volume in cubic feet. Since the boulder weighs 160 pounds per cubic foot and has volume $V$ cubic feet:
$$x = 160V$$

steps.title: Multiply the volume inequality by 160
steps.content:
The volume satisfies $14.6 < V < 18.6$. Since $x = 160V$, multiply all parts of this inequality by 160 (a positive number, so the inequality direction stays the same):
$$160(14.6) < 160V < 160(18.6)$$
Substituting $x = 160V$:
$$160(14.6) < x < 160(18.6)$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
